description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 35 hrs 51 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 6 mins per day. His work was mostly in Other (39%), Java (38%), and Markdown (14%). The data shows activity across 6 projects, but no public GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories.
